name: ApisCP
tagline: Self-hosted multi-tenant hosting control panel for an MSP-run platform.
summary: ApisCP (formerly apnscp) is an open-source hosting control panel that runs the MSP's own server estate as a multi-tenant hosting platform. The MSP operates the platform from an admin app called Nexus; each customer gets a per-account end-user panel for mail, DNS, files, databases, and 1-click web apps; security and isolation are enforced by ApisCP's own subsystems (Fortification, Rampart, Shield). The day-to-day surface area is closer to cPanel/WHM than to a cloud-orchestration tool, but the operational model is heavily command-line (cpcmd, Scopes, Ansible Bootstrapper) once you go past the panel.
